---
title: "Premimum Bond Prize Simulator"
format: 
  dashboard:
    scrolling: false
    theme: materia
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/drclongstaff/premium_bonds
      - icon: bluesky
        href: http://bsky.app/profile/drclongstaff.bsky.social
      - icon: globe2
        href: https://drclongstaff.github.io/shiny-clots
      - text: Contact
        href: mailto:drclongstaff@gmail.com
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(bslib)
library(data.table)
# Read once at startup, not on every input change
allMonths <- c("Jan", "Feb", "March", "April", "May", "June", "July", "Aug", "Sept", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec")
#set up the pool for prize draws = 1 in 23000 zeros
prizePool <- rep(0, 23000)
x <- round(runif(1)*23000)
prizePool[x] <- 1

prizeVal <- c(1e6, 100000, 50000, 25000, 10000, 5000, 1000, 500, 100, 50, 25)
prizeNos <- c(2,71,142,255,712,1421,15021, 45063, 1535556, 1535556, 2803175)
allPrizes <- sum(prizeNos)
prizeProb <- prizeNos/allPrizes
```


```{r}
#Month simulations
Earnest <- function(stake, pool, vals, probs){
  mywins <- sample(pool,stake, replace = TRUE)
  monthPrizes <- sum(mywins)
  monthWinnings <- sample(vals, monthPrizes, replace = TRUE,  prob = probs)
  monthTotal <- sum(monthWinnings)
  yearlyReturn <- (12*monthTotal/stake)*100
  
  # Collapse winnings into a readable string
  winningsStr <- if (length(monthWinnings) == 0) "0" else paste(sort(monthWinnings), collapse = ", ")
  results <- c(monthPrizes, monthTotal, yearlyReturn, winningsStr)
  
}

#Long term simulations
earnYear <- function(stake, pool, vals, probs){
  
  earnMonth <- function(stake, pool, vals, probs){
    mywins <- sample(pool,stake, replace = TRUE)
    monthPrizes <- sum(mywins)
    monthWinnings <- sample(vals, monthPrizes, replace = TRUE,  prob = probs)
    monthWin <- sum(monthWinnings)
  }
  
  Resmnth <- sapply(1:12, function(x) earnMonth(stake, pool, vals, probs))
  Resyrtotal <- sum(Resmnth)
}

```



#  {.sidebar}

#### Enter your premium bond holding and years of simulation

```{r}
tags$b("How many premium bonds to you hold (£)")
numericInput("bondStake", tags$b("Value of bonds"), value = 50000, min=1, max=50000)
tags$br()

```



```{r}

 numericInput("simYrs", tags$b("Years of simulation"), value=100, min=1, max=1000)

```


```{r}
tags$b("Summary of returns")
#actionButton("go", "Refresh", icon("refresh"), class = "btn-primary")
#tags$b(textOutput("bond"))
#tags$br()
```

[Learn more](https://www.nsandi.com/products/premium-bonds/) about premium bonds

[See my Shiny apps](https://drclongstaff.github.io/shiny-clots/) for reproducible analysis of biochemical assays

[Contact me](mailto:%20drclongstaff@gmail.com, "drclongstaff@gmail.com") for issues or comments about the dashboard. Or tell me if you have reclaimed a prize!

# Premium bond monthly prize draws began in 1956 and there are millions of unclaimed prizes

```{r}
#| context: server

monthRes <- reactive({
  monthRes <- data.frame("A"=1:5,
             "B"=2:6,
             "c"=3:7)
  monthRes
})

output$monthResTab <- renderTable({
  monthRes()
})


lifeRes <- reactive({
  set.seed(input$simYrs)
  runif(100)*10
})

output$lifeSim <- renderPlot({
hist(lifeRes())
})


```

## Row {height="14%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "There is £108,147,675 available"
#| color: pink
#| icon: currency-pound
p("from 2,608,195 unclaimed prizes")
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "This dashboard locates unclaimed prizes"
#| color: blue
#| icon: unlock-fill
p("simply enter premium bond numbers top-left")
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "This dashboard locates unclaimed prizes"
#| color: green
#| icon: unlock-fill
p("This is another box")
```


## Row {height="86%" .fill}

### Table

```{r}
#Summary table of data

probTab <- data.frame("Prize"=LETTERS[1:11],
                      "Value"=prizeVal,
                      "Number"=prizeNos,
                      "Probability"=signif(prizeProb,3)
)

summaryRow <- data.frame("Prize"="Totals", "Value"= sum(prizeVal), "Number"=allPrizes, "Probability" = round(sum(prizeProb)))

summaryTab <- rbind(probTab, summaryRow)

summaryTab |> gt() |> 
  #cols_label(Prize ~ "Prize Value", Number ~ "Number of Prizes", Total_value ~ "Total Value") |> 
  tab_header(title = "Expected prizes") |> 
  opt_stylize(style = 6, color = "pink") |> 
  opt_table_font(stack = "humanist") #|> 
  #tab_footnote(
    #footnote = "There are 2,608,195 unclaimed prizes totalling £108,147,675"
    
  #)
  
```


### Table

```{r}
tableOutput("monthResTab")
```


### Plot

```{r}
plotOutput("lifeSim")
```
